verbosity: int = 0 or 1¶

Set to 1 if you wish to see any errors that occured during computation and 0 otherwise.

kp¶
Type:

double

Value:

0.05

Parameter to set the pivot scale in \(Mpc^{-1}\). Planck mission sets it at \(0.05 Mpc^{-1}\).
